issues_found: Trump Accounts described but no legislative details, implementation timeline, or Congressional action mentioned in source
Trump Accounts lacks statutory basis or authorization - policy described as 'vision' only
No independent verification methodology for claimed statistics (10% refund increase, 4.6M claims, etc.)
Source is promotional/political communication rather than substantive policy announcement
human_review_reason: Record is technically accurate and well-structured, but source has marginal archival value for a macro catalyst research archive. The speech is promotional in nature, contains self-reported statistics without verification methodology, and the Trump Accounts initiative lacks any implementation details or legislative basis. Recommend human assessment of whether fiscal policy tracking is within scope - if so, include with appropriate caveats; if focused on market-moving catalysts, this has minimal value.
